title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is a tool that replaces or supplements Figma for design tasks, enabling users to generate branded landing pages and design assets from scratch using a 4-step framework. The setup takes approximately one afternoon and produces production-ready outputs while maintaining brand consistency.
writeup: This video walks through Claude Design, a tool positioned to replace or supplement Figma for design tasks, and lays out a 4-step framework for generating branded landing pages and design assets from scratch. It matters because the workflow targets production-ready outputs while holding brand consistency across assets. The concrete takeaways: the setup takes roughly one afternoon, the process relies on prompt engineering and workflow automation, and the four steps structure how assets get generated and kept on-brand.
